math_recheck: Re-derived against primary arXiv 2311.11793 LaTeX source and the van der Hoog SOSA-2025 source: time/comparison lower bounds (max{n-2,m-2n+2}=Omega(m); decision-tree >=ceil(log D); F-n+1 via <=F-1 equations < F variables), full interval lemma (polytope, 2(n-m) gap bound, (2e)^{n-m}, 1+2/ln2 combine, n-m<=log e(P)), doubly-exponential heap constants (|H_i|<=2^{2^i}, |H_{i-1}|>2^{2^{i-1}}-2^{2^{i-2}}, W>2^{2^{i-3}}, 2^{i-3}=2^i/8, convergent Sum 1/2^{2^{i-2}}, <=1+loglog n heaps), bottleneck lemma log D>=(n-b)/2 and <=n-b marked, link-by-index and one-word suffix-min bit vector. All constants/signs/cases match.
